en.title: Best Smartphones of 2026: Expert-Tested & Ranked
en.description: The top flagship phones of 2026 ranked on performance, camera, display, battery, and value, from the battery-king iPhone 17 Pro Max and 200MP Galaxy S26 Ultra to the two-day OnePlus 15 and the camera monster Oppo Find X9 Ultra.

zh-tw.title: 2026 最佳智慧型手機排行榜：實測推薦
zh-tw.description: 2026 年旗艦手機推薦，從續航之王 iPhone 17 Pro Max、200MP 四鏡頭 Galaxy S26 Ultra，到兩天一充的 OnePlus 15 與相機怪物 Oppo Find X9 Ultra，依效能、相機、螢幕、續航、性價比完整評比。

en.description: The best phone for most people in 2026, pairing the longest battery life of any flagship with a 48MP triple-camera system and the A19 Pro chip.

zh-tw.description: 2026 年最多人該買的那一台，續航是目前所有旗艦裡最猛的，配 48MP 三鏡頭跟 A19 Pro 晶片，一整天重度使用還有電，這點真的沒對手。

en.description: The best camera phone in 2026, with a quad-rear array led by a 200MP main sensor, dual telephoto zoom, the built-in S Pen, and seven years of updates.

zh-tw.description: 2026 年相機最強的旗艦，後置四鏡頭以 200MP 主鏡領軍，兩段光學變焦加上內建 S Pen，還給你七年更新，想拍照又想做筆記選它就對了。

en.description: The smartest phone of 2026, where Gemini AI and 100x Pro Res Zoom produce sharp shots no optical system can match, on a brilliant 6.8-inch display.

zh-tw.description: 2026 年最聰明的手機，Gemini AI 加上 100x Pro Res Zoom 變焦，拍出來的細節光學鏡頭根本追不上，6.8 吋螢幕也是頂規，AI 體驗目前就它最完整。

en.description: The Android value champion, with a Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5, a record-setting battery that runs over two full days, and 120W fast charging, all from $899.

zh-tw.description: Android 性價比王者，Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 配上實測能撐超過兩天的破紀錄電池，還有 120W 快充，這配置開這價，旁邊的旗艦都被它襯得很貴。

en.description: The smart-money iPhone, delivering the core flagship experience, a 120Hz display, strong cameras, and the A19 chip at a fraction of the Pro Max price.

zh-tw.description: 聰明人會買的 iPhone，旗艦該有的體驗一個都沒少，終於補上 120Hz 螢幕，相機夠用，A19 晶片夠快，價格卻只要 Pro Max 一半多，預算有限買這台最划算。

en.description: A photography flagship built around a 1-inch main sensor and a 200MP periscope telephoto, with a flat 3500-nit display and Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5.

zh-tw.description: 為拍照而生的旗艦，1 吋主感光元件配 200MP 潛望長焦，3500 nits 平面螢幕看了很爽，再加 Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5，攝影玩家會很愛這台的硬體規格。

en.description: The ultimate camera phone of 2026, with dual 200MP sensors including a 1/1.28-inch 3x telephoto, the largest tele module in any phone, for true pro reach.

zh-tw.description: 2026 年相機的天花板，雙 200MP 感光元件，其中 3x 長焦用上 1/1.28 吋這種手機史上最大的長焦模組，望遠端畫質直接逼近專業相機，拍照狂人的夢幻機。台灣沒有官方代理，得走代購。

en.description: The compact smart flagship, packing the same Tensor G5, Gemini AI, and Pro camera system as the XL into a one-hand 6.3-inch body.

zh-tw.description: 想要小機身又不想犧牲規格就選它，Tensor G5、Gemini AI、Pro 級相機跟 XL 完全一樣，全塞進 6.3 吋單手好握的機身，小手用戶終於有頂規可以選。

en.description: The compact Android flagship, with a 6.2-inch display, flagship Snapdragon performance, a versatile triple camera, and the same seven-year update promise.

zh-tw.description: 小尺寸的 Android 旗艦，6.2 吋螢幕單手剛剛好，旗艦級 Snapdragon 效能加上三鏡頭夠全能，一樣享有七年更新，喜歡小手機的 Android 用戶看這台。

en.description: The thinnest iPhone ever, at 5.6mm, with a titanium frame, a 6.5-inch ProMotion display, and the A19 Pro chip for those who want flagship power in a featherweight body.

zh-tw.description: 史上最薄 iPhone，只有 5.6mm，鈦金屬機身配 6.5 吋 ProMotion 螢幕跟 A19 Pro 晶片，拿在手上輕到有點不真實，想要旗艦效能又超在意手感的人會被它電到。

references.title: The best phone 2026: top smartphones in the US right now
Best phones 2026 tested — our top picks
Best Phone 2026: Top 10 Android & iPhone Mobile Phones Today

en.commentary: The iPhone 17 Pro Max is my best phone of 2026, and the reason is simple: it lasts longer than anything else I've carried. I went two heavy days of navigation, camera use, and hotspot tethering before reaching for a charger, and the 48MP triple-camera system finally matches that endurance with telephoto reach Apple has chased for years. It earns the top spot on the metric most people actually feel every single day. The Galaxy S26 Ultra is the camera winner, and its 200MP main sensor with dual telephoto zoom pulls detail out of distant subjects that the iPhone simply can't reach, with the bundled S Pen sealing it for note-takers. The Pixel 10 Pro XL is the smartest phone here. Its 100x Pro Res Zoom and on-device Gemini features do things with a photo and a sentence that feel a year ahead of everyone else. The real story of 2026 is the OnePlus 15. It runs over two full days on a charge, charges at 120W, and starts at $899, which makes the four-figure flagships above it look expensive for what you get. If you want the cleanest value in the entire list, buy it and don't look back. For most buyers I steer toward the standard iPhone 17, which finally adds a 120Hz display and delivers the core flagship experience at $799. Spend the Pro Max money only if battery and zoom are your whole reason for upgrading.

highlights.title: The iPhone 17 Pro Max wins on battery, and battery is what you feel every day
highlights.body: I went two full days of heavy use before charging, something earlier flagships couldn't touch. Camera megapixels and chip benchmarks land close across the top tier, but endurance is the difference you notice from morning to night. The Pro Max wins that decisively, and the 48MP triple camera finally adds the telephoto reach to back it up.

highlights.title: The Galaxy S26 Ultra is the camera king, pulling distant detail no rival can match
highlights.body: The 200MP main sensor paired with dual optical zoom keeps far more detail on concert and stadium shots than the iPhone holds onto. Add the built-in S Pen for notes and PDF signing, and for anyone who wants serious photography plus real productivity, this is the most complete Android flagship you can buy.

highlights.title: The OnePlus 15 is the real story of 2026, and $899 makes the rest look overpriced
highlights.body: Over two days on a charge, 120W fast charging, and a Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5, all starting at $899. That combination makes the four-figure flagships above it look expensive for what they deliver. If you ask me for the single cleanest value on this entire list, I point straight at this phone.

highlights.title: Most people should buy the standard iPhone 17 and skip the Pro Max premium
highlights.body: The iPhone 17 finally adds a 120Hz display, a fast A19 chip, and strong cameras, delivering the core flagship experience at $799, roughly half the Pro Max price. Spend the extra money only if longer battery life and stronger zoom are your entire reason for upgrading.

zh-tw.commentary: 我心中 2026 年的最佳手機就是 iPhone 17 Pro Max，理由很單純，它的續航比我用過的任何一台都還猛。我帶著它連續兩天重度導航、狂拍照、還開熱點分享，才需要找充電器，48MP 三鏡頭這次終於把長焦端補上，畫質配得上這個續航，光是「每天都有感」的這點就足以讓它穩坐第一。Galaxy S26 Ultra 是相機冠軍，200MP 主鏡加上兩段光學變焦，拍遠處的細節是 iPhone 追不上的，再加上內建 S Pen，常做筆記的人直接被它收服。Pixel 10 Pro XL 則是最聰明的一台，100x Pro Res Zoom 加上機上 Gemini，給它一張照片跟一句話它就能變出別人做不到的東西，AI 體驗領先同業大概一年。不過 2026 年真正的主角是 OnePlus 15，一次充電撐超過兩天，120W 快充，售價只要 $899，把上面那些四位數美金的旗艦襯得有夠貴。要說整份榜單裡最無腦的性價比之選，就是它，買下去別猶豫。如果是一般人來問我，我會直接推標準版 iPhone 17，終於補上 120Hz 螢幕，旗艦核心體驗一個不少，台灣售價 NT$29,900。除非你升級的全部理由就是續航跟變焦，不然真的不用多花 Pro Max 的錢。

highlights.title: iPhone 17 Pro Max 第一名靠的是續航，這是每天都有感的東西
highlights.body: 我連續兩天重度使用才需要充電，這在以前的旗艦想都不敢想。規格表上的相機畫素、晶片跑分大家都差不多，但續航是你每天從早到晚實際感受到的差別。Pro Max 在這項贏得乾脆，加上 48MP 三鏡頭終於把長焦補齊，這就是它值得坐第一的原因。

highlights.title: Galaxy S26 Ultra 是相機之王，200MP 加雙長焦把遠景吃乾抹淨
highlights.body: 200MP 主鏡搭配兩段光學變焦，拍演唱會、拍球場那種遠距離主體，細節保留得比 iPhone 多一截。再加上內建 S Pen 可以隨手做筆記、簽 PDF，對於既要拍照又要生產力的人，這台是 Android 陣營最完整的選擇。

highlights.title: OnePlus 15 才是 2026 的真正主角，$899 把上面的旗艦都比成盤子
highlights.body: 一次充電撐超過兩天、120W 快充、Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5，這套配置開 $899（約 NT$28,900），上面那幾台動輒四萬以上的旗艦瞬間顯得很不划算。如果你問我整份榜單最無腦的性價比之選，我會毫不猶豫指這台。

highlights.title: 一般人買標準版 iPhone 17 就夠了，不用多花 Pro Max 的錢
highlights.body: iPhone 17 終於補上 120Hz 螢幕，A19 晶片夠快、相機夠用，旗艦該有的核心體驗一個都沒少，台灣售價 NT$29,900 只要 Pro Max 一半多。除非你升級的全部理由就是更長的續航跟更強的變焦，不然標準版才是聰明的選擇。

I tested the 7 top flagship phones of 2026

en.commentary: Heading into June I am keeping the iPhone 17 Pro Max at number one, and the reason is the same boring strength that wins every long-term test: battery life paired with a chip nobody catches. The A19 Pro still posts the highest sustained scores in the field, and the Pro Max simply lasts longer between charges than anything else this size. That combination is what I want from a phone I carry every day. The Galaxy S26 Ultra holds a very close second on the strength of its cameras. The 200MP main sensor and the new Privacy Shield display, the only S26 variant to get it, make it the most complete Android flagship, and Samsung held the starting price flat year over year, which keeps it honest value at this tier. Pixel 10 Pro XL stays third because Google's photography and on-device AI remain the smartest in any phone, from call screening to live translation in your own voice. The middle of the board is where the value lives. OnePlus 15 stays fourth as the performance-per-dollar champion with its huge battery, and the regular iPhone 17 holds fifth as the phone I recommend to most people who do not need a Pro. Xiaomi 17 Ultra, Oppo Find X9 Ultra and the rest carry forward. Nothing this week reshuffled the order, so I held ranks and let the verdicts stand. Buy the Pro Max for endurance, the S26 Ultra for the camera, the Pixel for AI.

highlights.title: iPhone 17 Pro Max wins on endurance
highlights.body: The A19 Pro posts the highest sustained performance in the field and the Pro Max outlasts every rival its size between charges. That pairing of speed and battery is exactly what a daily driver needs, so it stays number one.

highlights.title: Galaxy S26 Ultra owns the camera crown
highlights.body: Its 200MP main sensor and exclusive Privacy Shield display make it the most complete Android flagship, and Samsung kept the starting price flat year over year. That keeps it honest value and a deserved close second.

highlights.title: Pixel 10 Pro XL is the smartest phone
highlights.body: Google's computational photography and on-device AI, from call screening to live translation in your own voice, remain unmatched. For anyone who buys a phone for its brains, the Pixel holds a clear third.

highlights.title: OnePlus 15 is the value flagship
highlights.body: Its huge battery and top-tier performance deliver the best price-to-power ratio on the board. For buyers who want flagship speed without the flagship price, it stays the smart fourth-place pick.

zh-tw.commentary: 進入 6 月，我還是把 iPhone 17 Pro Max 放第一，理由就是那個每次長期測試都會贏的無聊強項，續航加上一顆沒人追得上的晶片。A19 Pro 在持續效能上還是全場最高，Pro Max 同尺寸裡就是比別人撐更久。這個組合正是我每天帶著走的手機要的東西。Galaxy S26 Ultra 緊咬第二，靠的是相機。2 億畫素主鏡頭加上新的 Privacy Shield 螢幕，全 S26 系列只有它有，讓它成為最完整的 Android 旗艦，而且三星起售價跟去年持平，這個級距算很實在了。Pixel 10 Pro XL 守第三，因為 Google 的拍照跟裝置端 AI 還是所有手機裡最聰明的，從來電過濾到用你自己的聲音即時翻譯都是。話說回來，榜單中段才是性價比的天下。OnePlus 15 守第四，靠大電池當每塊錢效能最強的選手，一般版 iPhone 17 守第五，是我會推薦給多數不需要 Pro 的人的機型。Xiaomi 17 Ultra、Oppo Find X9 Ultra 跟其他全部照舊。這週沒事件洗牌，所以我守住排名。要續航選 Pro Max，要相機選 S26 Ultra，要 AI 選 Pixel。

highlights.title: iPhone 17 Pro Max 贏在續航
highlights.body: A19 Pro 持續效能全場最高，Pro Max 同尺寸裡每次充電都撐得比對手久。這種速度加電量的搭配正是每日機要的，所以第一是它。

highlights.title: Galaxy S26 Ultra 拿下相機王冠
highlights.body: 2 億畫素主鏡頭加獨家 Privacy Shield 螢幕，讓它成為最完整的 Android 旗艦，三星起售價又跟去年持平。這讓它實在又超值，緊咬第二實至名歸。

highlights.title: Pixel 10 Pro XL 是最聰明的手機
highlights.body: Google 的運算攝影跟裝置端 AI，從來電過濾到用你自己聲音即時翻譯，依然無人能比。買手機看腦袋的人，Pixel 穩坐第三。

highlights.title: OnePlus 15 是性價比旗艦
highlights.body: 大電池加頂級效能，端出榜上最強的價格對效能比。想要旗艦速度又不想付旗艦價的人，它就是聰明的第四名選擇。

Best Phone 2026: Top 10 Android & iPhone Mobile Phones Today

en.commentary: The iPhone 17 Pro Max stays at number one, and the case is the same one TechRadar lands on: it is the most complete premium phone you can buy, with the same camera system and chip as the smaller Pro for a thousand-dollar entry, and a battery that finally goes the distance. I keep it on top because it has no glaring weakness, which is the whole point of a flagship. The Galaxy S26 Ultra holds second and earns it on the camera, the 200MP main sensor pulls color and detail in low light that nothing else matches, and the zoom and night photography are still class-leading. The one knock is the missing magnetic Qi2 charging, which keeps it a hair behind. The Pixel 10 Pro XL stays third and is genuinely the critics' darling, Tech Advisor calls it the best phone today on the strength of computational photography and the 100x Pro Res Zoom that produces usable shots no optical system alone could. I keep it third on the all-round balance rather than any weakness. OnePlus 15 holds fourth as the value flagship, and the iPhone 17 rounds out the top five as the smartest spend in the lineup. Nothing this week forced a reorder, so I held ranks.

highlights.title: iPhone 17 Pro Max is the most complete phone
highlights.body: Same camera and chip as the smaller Pro for a $1,099 entry, plus a battery that finally lasts. It has no glaring weakness, which is exactly what a flagship at number one should deliver.

highlights.title: Galaxy S26 Ultra owns the camera
highlights.body: Its 200MP main sensor pulls color and detail in low light nothing else matches, with class-leading zoom and night shots. The missing magnetic Qi2 charging is the only thing keeping it a hair behind at second.

highlights.title: Pixel 10 Pro XL is the critics' darling
highlights.body: Tech Advisor calls it the best phone today, and the 100x Pro Res Zoom produces usable shots no optical system alone could. I hold it third on all-round balance, not on any weakness.

highlights.title: OnePlus 15 is the value flagship
highlights.body: It delivers near-flagship performance and battery for noticeably less than the top three. For buyers who want most of the experience without the premium price, it stays the smart pick at fourth.

zh-tw.commentary: iPhone 17 Pro Max 我還是放第一，理由跟 TechRadar 一樣：它是你買得到最完整的高階手機，相機系統跟晶片跟小一號的 Pro 一模一樣，一千美元起跳，電池終於夠用一整天。我把它放頂端，是因為它沒有明顯短板，這正是旗艦的意義。Galaxy S26 Ultra 守第二，贏在相機，2 億畫素主感光元件在低光下抓到的色彩跟細節沒人能比，變焦跟夜拍依然是同級最強。唯一的扣分是少了磁吸 Qi2 充電，讓它差一點點。Pixel 10 Pro XL 守第三，是真正的評測寵兒，Tech Advisor 說它是現在最好的手機，靠的是運算攝影跟 100 倍 Pro Res Zoom，能拍出純光學系統做不到的可用畫面。我把它放第三是看整體均衡。OnePlus 15 守第四，是性價比旗艦，iPhone 17 收尾前五，是整個陣容裡最聰明的花法。這週沒有事件逼我重排，所以守住排名。

highlights.title: iPhone 17 Pro Max 是最完整的手機
highlights.body: 相機跟晶片跟小一號的 Pro 一樣，台幣約三萬五起跳，電池終於撐得住一整天。它沒有明顯短板，這正是第一名旗艦該交出的東西。

highlights.title: Galaxy S26 Ultra 主宰相機
highlights.body: 2 億畫素主感光元件在低光下抓到的色彩細節沒人能比，變焦跟夜拍同級最強。少了磁吸 Qi2 充電是唯一讓它差一點點、守第二的原因。

highlights.title: Pixel 10 Pro XL 是評測寵兒
highlights.body: Tech Advisor 說它是現在最好的手機，100 倍 Pro Res Zoom 拍得出純光學做不到的可用畫面。我放它第三是看整體均衡。

highlights.title: OnePlus 15 是性價比旗艦
highlights.body: 它用明顯更低的價格給出接近旗艦的效能跟續航。想要大部分體驗又不想付高階價的人，它穩坐第四當聰明選擇。

en.commentary: The iPhone 17 Pro Max holds number one for one decisive reason: battery life. It simply runs longer than anything else in this class, and that endurance, paired with the most premium build and the deepest app ecosystem, makes it the default flagship for most buyers. TechRadar still ranks it best phone overall this week, and nothing in the field dislodged it. The Galaxy S26 Ultra stays a very close second and remains a genuine joy to use. Its 6.9-inch AMOLED is the most alluring display on the market and its camera system edges ahead on versatility, though the absence of magnetic Qi2 charging keeps it a half step behind the iPhone and Pixel ranges on convenience. The Pixel 10 Pro XL holds third as the phone with no real weaknesses. It excels across hardware and software, and Night Sight is still the gold standard for low-light photography in 2026, which is why Tech Advisor calls it the best phone you can buy today. The order at the top reflects three different strengths: the iPhone wins on battery and ecosystem, the S26 Ultra on display and camera flair, and the Pixel on computational photography and software smarts. Lower down, the OnePlus 15 keeps its grip on value with a huge battery and flagship speed for less money, and the iPhone 17 remains the smart mainstream pick. No rankings moved this week. Buy the 17 Pro Max for all-day battery and the best overall package, the S26 Ultra for the finest screen and Android camera, and the Pixel 10 Pro XL for the smartest photography.

highlights.title: iPhone 17 Pro Max wins on battery and ecosystem
highlights.body: It runs longer than anything in its class and pairs that endurance with the most premium build and deepest app support. TechRadar still ranks it best phone overall, and it remains the default flagship.

highlights.title: Galaxy S26 Ultra has the best display and Android camera
highlights.body: Its 6.9-inch AMOLED is the most alluring screen on the market and its cameras lead on versatility. The lack of magnetic Qi2 charging is the only thing keeping it a half step behind on convenience.

highlights.title: Pixel 10 Pro XL is the no-weakness phone
highlights.body: It excels across hardware and software, and Night Sight remains the gold standard for low-light shots in 2026. Tech Advisor calls it the best phone you can buy today for good reason.

highlights.title: OnePlus 15 is the value champion
highlights.body: It delivers a huge battery and flagship-grade speed for noticeably less money. For buyers who want top-tier performance without the flagship price, it is the smartest spend in this lineup.

zh-tw.commentary: iPhone 17 Pro Max 這週守住第一，理由很關鍵，就是電池續航。它就是比同級任何一支都還能撐，這個續航力加上最頂級的做工跟最完整的 App 生態系，讓它成為多數人的預設旗艦。TechRadar 這週還是把它列為整體最佳手機，這個領域沒有任何對手撼動它。Galaxy S26 Ultra 緊咬第二，用起來真的很爽。它那塊 6.9 吋 AMOLED 是市面上最迷人的螢幕，相機系統在多功能性上小贏一截，不過少了磁吸 Qi2 充電，便利性上還是輸 iPhone 跟 Pixel 半步。Pixel 10 Pro XL 排第三，是那種沒有明顯弱點的手機。它軟硬體都很強，Night Sight 在 2026 年依舊是夜拍的黃金標準，所以 Tech Advisor 直接說它是現在最值得買的手機。前三名其實反映三種不同強項，iPhone 贏在電池跟生態系，S26 Ultra 贏在螢幕跟相機調性，Pixel 贏在運算攝影跟軟體聰明度。再往下，OnePlus 15 繼續守住性價比，超大電池加旗艦速度，價格卻便宜不少，iPhone 17 則是聰明的主流選擇。這週排名沒動。想要整天用不完的電池跟最完整體驗就 17 Pro Max，想要最棒螢幕跟 Android 相機就 S26 Ultra，想要最聰明的拍照就 Pixel 10 Pro XL。

highlights.title: iPhone 17 Pro Max 贏在電池跟生態系
highlights.body: 它比同級任何一支都還能撐，這個續航加上最頂級做工跟最完整 App 支援。TechRadar 還是把它列為整體最佳手機，它依舊是預設旗艦。

highlights.title: Galaxy S26 Ultra 螢幕跟 Android 相機最強

zh-tw.commentary: iPhone 17 Pro Max 守住我的第一名，因為它還是你買得到最全面的六邊形戰士，這個月的旗艦測試也一直在確認這點。效能餘裕、頂級相機、亮螢幕，加上重度使用一天還有得剩的續航，加起來就是一支沒有明顯短板的手機。Galaxy S26 Ultra 靠那塊 6.9 吋 AMOLED 守住第二，評測一直點名它是手機上最有電影感的螢幕，現在還加了 Flex Magic Pixel 防窺，側面的人看不到你的畫面。Pixel 10 Pro XL 守住第三，我想講清楚它憑什麼，Google 的 Night Sight 在 2026 還是夜拍的黃金標準，在快全黑的環境拍出來的照片一直讓我驚訝。有些媒體甚至把它選為整體最佳，我懂那個論點，但我維持我的順序。OnePlus 15 還是那個價值冠軍，想要旗艦速度跟大電池又不想付頂規價就選它，iPhone 17 則是大多數人的聰明選擇，用遠低於 Pro 的價格拿到蘋果的核心體驗。這禮拜沒有新品重洗前十，所以整份順序我延用。

highlights.title: iPhone 17 Pro Max 是全能王
highlights.body: 頂效能、頂相機、亮螢幕，加上重度用一天還有剩的續航，加起來就是一支沒明顯短板的手機，守住第一。

highlights.title: Galaxy S26 Ultra 螢幕最強
highlights.body: 6.9 吋 AMOLED 是手機上最有電影感的面板，Flex Magic Pixel 防窺讓你在捷運或飛機上，側面的人看不到畫面。

highlights.title: 夜拍就看 Pixel 10 Pro XL
highlights.body: Google 的 Night Sight 在 2026 還是夜拍黃金標準，在快全黑的環境拉出堪用的照片，一直讓我驚訝，穩守第三。

highlights.title: OnePlus 15 是價值冠軍
highlights.body: 旗艦速度加大電池又不用付頂規價，想追求每塊錢效能的人我都推它。

highlights.title: 多數人選 iPhone 17
highlights.body: 用遠低於 Pro 的價格拿到蘋果核心體驗、好相機跟漂亮螢幕，這就是它守住中段的原因。

en.commentary: The iPhone 17 Pro Max keeps first this week on the back of its all-day-and-then-some battery and the most consistent performance in the class, which is why it stays my default recommendation for people who just want the best. The Galaxy S26 Ultra holds second as the Android flagship to beat, with a camera system that still leads on versatility and a display that is a joy to use in bright sun. The Pixel 10 Pro XL keeps third because its computational photography remains the one to catch, especially for anyone who shoots in tricky light and wants the shot to just work. Value hunters should look hard at the OnePlus 15 in fourth, where flagship speed and enormous battery life arrive at a price the big two rarely touch. The month's real action is in foldables, with Samsung's Galaxy Z Fold 8 and Z Flip 8 expected soon, alongside a busy slate from Nothing, Oppo, and Motorola. None of those have shipped in a way that reorders my bar phones, so I held ranks steady this week. My advice stands: buy the 17 Pro Max if you want the safest premium pick, buy the S26 Ultra if you want the most flexible Android camera, buy the Pixel 10 Pro XL if photography leads your list, and buy the OnePlus 15 if you want flagship feel for less. If a foldable tempts you, wait for the Fold 8 reveal before you commit.

highlights.title: 17 Pro Max is the safe pick
highlights.body: Class-leading battery and the most consistent performance keep it my default for anyone who just wants the best phone.

highlights.title: S26 Ultra leads Android
highlights.body: The most versatile camera system and a superb bright-sun display keep it the flagship to beat on Android.

highlights.title: OnePlus 15 for value
highlights.body: Flagship speed and huge battery life at a price the big two rarely match make it the smart budget flagship.

highlights.title: Foldables heat up
highlights.body: Samsung's Galaxy Z Fold 8 and Z Flip 8 are expected soon, so wait for the reveal if a foldable is on your list.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週 iPhone 17 Pro Max 還是第一，靠的是撐一整天還有剩的電量，加上這個級距最穩定的效能，所以只想要最好的人，我預設都推它。Galaxy S26 Ultra 排第二，是 Android 要打倒的旗艦，相機系統的全能度仍領先，螢幕在大太陽下用起來也很爽。Pixel 10 Pro XL 第三，因為它的運算攝影還是大家要追的目標，尤其光線刁鑽的場合想要「按下去就成」，選它最對。想找 CP 值的人要認真看第四名的 OnePlus 15，旗艦速度加超大電量，價格卻是兩大廠很少下探到的。這個月真正的重頭戲在摺疊機，Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 跟 Z Flip 8 快要來了，Nothing、Oppo、Motorola 也排得很滿。這些都還沒開賣到會改變我這幾支直立機的排序，所以這週排名維持。建議照舊：想要最安全的高階款就買 17 Pro Max，想要最全能的 Android 相機就買 S26 Ultra，攝影擺第一就買 Pixel 10 Pro XL，想用比較少的錢摸到旗艦手感就買 OnePlus 15。如果你被摺疊機燒到，等 Fold 8 亮相再決定。

highlights.title: 17 Pro Max 最安全
highlights.body: 級距最強電量加最穩效能，只想要最好手機的人,我預設就推它。

highlights.title: S26 Ultra 領銜安卓
highlights.body: 最全能的相機系統加大太陽下超讚的螢幕,穩坐 Android 要打倒的旗艦。

highlights.title: OnePlus 15 拚 CP
highlights.body: 旗艦速度加超大電量,價格卻是兩大廠很少下探的區間,聰明的省錢旗艦。

iPhone 17 vs Samsung Galaxy S26: Which flagship wins?

en.commentary: I am keeping the iPhone 17 Pro Max at number one, and this week's flagship coverage keeps calling it the best phone you can buy right now. It wins the way I want a top phone to win: elite performance, all-day and then some battery, and a camera system that holds up in almost any light. Apple also brought its 120Hz ProMotion display down to more of the lineup this cycle, which tightened the whole range. The Galaxy S26 Ultra stays second as the best Android phone, and reviewers this week framed the two as equally excellent for different people. Samsung still leads on reach with its versatile multi-camera setup and that big, bright panel, so if you live in the Android world it is the one to beat. The Pixel 10 Pro XL holds third on the strength of its computational camera, which keeps earning praise as the smartest point-and-shoot in a phone. The OnePlus 15 stays fourth as my value flagship, pairing huge battery life with strong performance at a friendlier price, and the standard iPhone 17 keeps fifth now that ProMotion is no longer a Pro-only perk. Down the list, the Xiaomi 17 Ultra and Oppo Find X9 Ultra remain camera monsters for enthusiasts, while the Galaxy S26 and iPhone Air round out the field. Nothing launched this week to upset the order and prices held, so I copied it forward. Pick your ecosystem first, then let camera priorities and budget choose the exact model.

highlights.title: iPhone 17 Pro Max is still the best overall
highlights.body: Elite performance, huge battery, and a camera that holds up in any light. This week's coverage again called it the best phone you can buy, so it stays number one.

highlights.title: S26 Ultra leads Android
highlights.body: Its versatile multi-camera setup and big bright panel keep it the one to beat on Android. Reviewers framed it and the iPhone as equally excellent for different people.

highlights.title: Pixel 10 Pro XL owns the camera smarts
highlights.body: Its computational photography keeps earning praise as the smartest point-and-shoot in a phone. That strength holds it firmly at third.

highlights.title: OnePlus 15 is the value flagship
highlights.body: Huge battery and strong performance at a friendlier price keep it at fourth. If you want flagship feel without the flagship bill, this is my pick.

zh-tw.commentary: 我讓 iPhone 17 Pro Max 續坐第一，這週的旗艦報導也一直把它叫做現在最值得買的手機。它贏的方式正是我對一支頂級手機的期待：頂尖效能、撐一整天還有剩的電池，還有一套幾乎在任何光線下都撐得住的相機系統。這一代蘋果還把 120Hz ProMotion 螢幕下放到更多機型，把整條產品線都收得更緊。Galaxy S26 Ultra 守住第二，是最強的 Android 手機，這週評測把這兩支定位成「一樣優秀，只是適合不同人」。三星在多鏡頭的涵蓋範圍上還是領先，那塊又大又亮的面板也很強，所以你要是活在 Android 世界，它就是要被超越的那支。Pixel 10 Pro XL 靠運算攝影守第三，一直被誇是手機裡最聰明的隨手拍。OnePlus 15 守第四，是我的性價比旗艦，把超大電池配上強效能，價格又更親民；標準版 iPhone 17 守第五，畢竟 ProMotion 現在不再是 Pro 專屬。往下看，Xiaomi 17 Ultra 跟 Oppo Find X9 Ultra 對玩家來說還是相機怪獸，Galaxy S26 跟 iPhone Air 補齊名單。這週沒有新機來攪局，價格也沒動，所以我把順序沿用下來。先選生態系，再讓相機取向跟預算幫你決定確切型號。

highlights.title: iPhone 17 Pro Max 仍是最佳整體
highlights.body: 頂尖效能、超大電池、任何光線都撐得住的相機。這週報導又把它叫做最值得買的手機，第一名續坐。

highlights.title: S26 Ultra 領軍 Android
highlights.body: 多鏡頭涵蓋範圍加上又大又亮的面板，讓它是 Android 要被超越的那支。評測把它跟 iPhone 定位成一樣優秀、適合不同人。

highlights.title: Pixel 10 Pro XL 拿下相機智慧
highlights.body: 它的運算攝影一直被誇是手機裡最聰明的隨手拍。這份強項讓它穩坐第三。

highlights.title: OnePlus 15 是性價比旗艦
highlights.body: 超大電池配上強效能，價格又更親民，守住第四。想要旗艦手感又不想付旗艦價，我就選它。
